Skip to contents
survtrans 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    The Generation of Simulated Survival Data

Transfer Learning of Multi-source for Cox proportional hazards model

Source: R/coxtrans.R
coxtrans.Rd

Transfer Learning of Multi-source for Cox proportional hazards model

Usage

coxtrans(
  formula,
  data,
  group,
  lambda1 = 0,
  lambda2 = 0,
  penalty = c("lasso", "MCP", "SCAD"),
  gamma = switch(penalty, SCAD = 3.7, MCP = 3, 1),
  rho = 1.1,
  init,
  control,
  ...
)

Arguments

formula

a formula expression as for regression models, of the form response ~ predictors. The response must be a survival object as returned by the Surv function.

data

a data frame containing the variables in the model.

group

a factor specifying the group of each sample.

lambda1

a non-negative value specifying the sparisity penalty parameter. The default is 0.

lambda2

a non-negative value specifying the group penalty parameter. The default is 0.

penalty

a character string specifying the penalty function. The default is "lasso". Other options are "MCP" and "SCAD".

gamma

a non-negative value specifying the penalty parameter. The default is 3.7 for SCAD and 3.0 for MCP.

rho

a value in (2, 10) specifying the expansion factor of the augmented Lagrangian's penalty parameter. The default is 1.1.

init

a numeric vector specifying the initial value of the coefficients. The default is a zero vector.

control

Object of class survtrans_control containing control parameters for the fitting algorithm. Default is survtrans_control(...).

...

Other arguments passed to survtrans_control.

Value

a coxtrans object.

Examples

library(survtrans)
formula <- Surv(time, status) ~ . - group - id
group <- as.factor(sim2$group)
fit <- coxtrans(
  formula, sim2, group,
  lambda1 = 0.05, lambda2 = 0.05, penalty = "SCAD"
)
fit$coefficients
#>          [,1]      [,2]      [,3]          [,4]          [,5]          [,6]
#> X1   0.000000 0.0000000  0.000000  8.730211e-08  0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00
#> X2  -1.042740 0.9517253 -1.042740  9.517253e-01 -1.042740e+00  9.517255e-01
#> X3   0.000000 0.0000000  0.000000  0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00 -4.102581e-09
#> X4  -1.009885 1.0098850 -1.009885  1.009885e+00 -1.009885e+00  1.009885e+00
#> X5   0.000000 0.0000000  0.000000 -3.254943e-08  0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00
#> X6  -1.151154 1.1589807 -1.151154  1.158981e+00 -1.151155e+00  1.158980e+00
#> X7   0.000000 0.0000000  0.000000 -2.504527e-08  8.766315e-08  1.562714e-07
#> X8  -1.098063 1.0980629 -1.098063  1.098063e+00 -1.098063e+00  1.098063e+00
#> X9   0.000000 0.0000000  0.000000  0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00
#> X10 -1.043362 1.0433622 -1.043362  1.043362e+00 -1.043362e+00  1.043362e+00

#> X3   0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00 0.000000e+00  1.04978506
